events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the back-pitched PVC condensing flue is a fail-grade, high-risk defect (condensate pooling → vent blockage/freeze-up/corrosion → possible flue gas spillage), with immediate controls being to red-tag the furnace, re-pitch and re-support the vent to manufacturer slope requirements per IRC M1801.1/NFPA 54, clear condensate, and reinspect before concealment or operation.
